[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000011 4
1 01001001 3
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 01010001 3
5 10000101 3
6 01000100 2
7 01111000 4

01 10 00000001 1
12 21 00000100 1
23 32 01000000 1
34 43 01100000 2
45 54 01100101 4
56 65 11000011 4 match 0
67 76 01000001 2
70 07 01000001 2

02 20 01000000 1
13 31 00000000 a match 2 3
24 42 01000100 2 match 6
35 53 01100000 2
46 64 01000001 2
57 75 01000001 2
60 06 01000001 2
71 17 00000001 1

03 30 01010000 2
14 41 00000101 2
25 52 01000100 2 match 6
36 63 01000000 1
47 74 01000001 2
50 05 01000001 2
61 16 10000001 2
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 01000001 2
15 51 10000101 3 match 5
26 62 01000000 1
37 73 01001000 2
